name: pcr-dev
description: PCR.dev CLI — capture AI coding prompts for peer review

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push && git push origin $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push && git push origin $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push && git push origin $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)

author: PCR.dev
